queries.question: What's the rating of the movies with Leonardo diCaprio
queries.sql:
SELECT FilmReviews.critic_rating, Actor.name
FROM FilmReviews
            JOIN Role ON FilmReviews.film_id = Role.film_id
            JOIN Actor ON Role.actor_id = Actor.id
WHERE Actor.name = "Leonardo DiCaprio"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?critic_rating ?name WHERE {
  ?filmreviews a :FilmReviews .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?filmreviews p:hasFilm ?shared_film .
  ?role p:hasFilm ?shared_film .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?filmreviews p:critic_rating ?critic_rating .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?actor p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Leonardo DiCaprio")
}

queries.question: What's the rating of the movies with Leonardo diCaprio
queries.sql:
SELECT FilmReviews.critic_rating, audience_rating, Actor.name
FROM FilmReviews
            JOIN Role ON FilmReviews.film_id = Role.film_id
            JOIN Actor ON Role.actor_id = Actor.id
WHERE Actor.name = "Leonardo DiCaprio"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?critic_rating ?audience_rating ?name WHERE {
  ?filmreviews a :FilmReviews .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?filmreviews p:hasFilm ?shared_film .
  ?role p:hasFilm ?shared_film .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?filmreviews p:critic_rating ?critic_rating .
  ?filmreviews p:audience_rating ?audience_rating .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?actor p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Leonardo DiCaprio")
}

queries.question: What is the audience ratings of each film?
queries.sql:
SELECT Film.Title, FilmReviews.audience_rating
FROM Film
            JOIN FilmReviews ON Film.id = FilmReviews.film_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?audience_rating WHERE {
  ?film a :Films .
  ?filmreviews a :FilmReviews .
  ?filmreviews p:hasFilm ?film .
  ?film p:title ?title .
  ?filmreviews p:audience_rating ?audience_rating .
}

queries.question: What is the critic ratings of each film?
queries.sql:
SELECT Film.Title, FilmReviews.critic_rating

queries.question: What are the ratings of all the films?
queries.sql:
SELECT Film.Title, FilmReviews.critic_rating, audience_rating
FROM Film
            JOIN FilmReviews ON Film.id = FilmReviews.film_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?critic_rating ?audience_rating WHERE {
  ?film a :Films .
  ?filmreviews a :FilmReviews .
  ?filmreviews p:hasFilm ?film .
  ?film p:title ?title .
  ?filmreviews p:critic_rating ?critic_rating .
  ?filmreviews p:audience_rating ?audience_rating .
}
